Dialog.name: Item_00D

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Japanese treat with red bean paste and cinnamon. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A thinly sliced turnip that's been pickled. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_013

Dialog.name: Item_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Smells so bad that your appetite disappears. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tastes so good that you may overindulge. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Keeps your skin young, but may cause acne. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Packs a punch, delivered straight to the muscles. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Insect food made edible for humans. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Clears your mind and enhances your memory. Restores 50 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Expensive, but tastes just like Hagakure's. Restores 100 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A high-end chocolate that's not overly sweet. Restores 30 SP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fully restores HP and SP to all allies.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_134

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chewy, chilled, and delicious. Restores 100 HP to 1 ally.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_13D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sweets loved by the royal family. Restores 50 HP to all allies.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_13E

Dialog.name: Item_13F

Dialog.name: Item_140

Dialog.name: Item_141
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An apple that sparkles like the rainbow. Fully restores HP to all allies.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_15E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning manners that will charm others.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_15F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for helping you attain a beautiful body via watching videos.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_160
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning the arts of seduction and sweet talking.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_161
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning about a variety of subjects.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_162
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning English through pictures and images.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_163
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for cultivating your thinking power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_164
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for children. Adults need courage to play this.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_165
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software that requires courage to defeat zombies through typing.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_166
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for living out the valorous feats of a Sengoku-era general.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_167
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software that uses videos to teach the best form to increase speed.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_168
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a site that studies ninja skills for greater agility.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_169
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning servicing skills to help you earn a higher hourly wage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning skills to increase the yield of your vegetable garden.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning how to effectively strengthen your muscles.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for learning how to build up muscle by using your mind.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for growing your mind through meditation.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}PC software for training your mental strength through expert methods.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_16F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For those who love beef bowls. Has a membership code for the official site.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_170
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a message board full of rumors about Iwatodai.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_171
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a covert site about a familiar school.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_172
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a blog written by devoted vegetable garden lovers.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_173
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a matchmaking site with a prepaid Offering Pass.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_174
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a revenge request site that has stirred up a buzz.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_175
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a blog whose author writes fanatically about Nyx.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_176
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a site featuring videos on taking down enemies.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_177
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a site detailing how to fatally strike your enemy.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_178
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A note with the URL of a site for posting anecdotes of inspiring people.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_186
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An investigator struggles to solve a case while navigating his chaotic personal life.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_187
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A recount of a certain woman's journey to prevail over her painful reality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_188
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A compilation of intense matches in a variety of fighting styles.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_189
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A set of various spices in assorted bottles. They give off an exotic scent.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_18A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A self-improvement book essential for those who wish to get stronger.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_18B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fitness guide containing information to be mastered. Only for advanced students.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_18D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cute toy that is a delight for dogs. Makes a sound when pressed.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_18E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A workbook designed to test one's skill in basic math.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_18F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The joys of working out are plain to see thanks to the man's beaming smile on the cover.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_191
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A heavily damaged book. The spine has fallen off.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_192
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A decently-sized bone. It's not clear what animal it came from.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_193
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Very expensive dog food. Irresistible to dogs with a good sense of smell.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_195
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A binder of "About Me" pages that friends can fill out together.[n]
